text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing a training session with Smart
Falcon...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Mmm-mmm! It's the magical twilight hour, and
I've got the track all to myself!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Talk about the stars aligning! It's exactly the
chance I've been waiting for! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I mean the chance for a dramatic training
session, of course!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No emotional Umadol documentary would be
complete without a scene of her working her butt
off behind the scenes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer! ☆ Is it okay if I do some extra
training now?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer! ☆ Is it okay if I do some extra
training now?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yay! Now we're talking! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: In that case—take this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I want you to record me giving it my all! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Bingo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
'Cause I'm absolutely, positively going to become
a top Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You have to get all the rare footage of me while
you still can! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon puts her all into her extra training
session... while occasionally mugging for the
camera.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-why not?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This is so I can stand center stage and become a
top Umadol!
choice_data_list:
If you want to become a top Umadol, you need
plenty of rest, too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oof!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer... Don't say it like that. It's not
faaair...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Fiiine... I'll make sure to rest up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Smart Falcon makes a big show of
looking down, she agrees to properly rest and
recuperate.
